summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Income & Expense Tracker application. All backend APIs working perfectly (34/34 tests passed). Frontend features functional with proper Philippine Peso formatting, responsive design, and seeded data display.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay preventing button clicks in some cases
Shows 'No data available' when month filter defaults to 2026-03 instead of 2025-03

design_issues.issue: Logout button not easily accessible - may be hidden in user menu

passed_tests: Dashboard summary cards display (Total Income: ₱62,838.00, Total Expenses: ₱71,042.00, Net Profit: -₱8,204.00)
Dashboard charts render (Income vs Expenses line chart, Product pie chart, Category pie chart)
Dashboard Top Customers list and Recent transactions
Income page CRUD operations (67 entries displayed)
Income search functionality (filtered from 67 to 7 entries)
Expense page CRUD operations (94 entries displayed)
Settings page with Products, Categories, Import tabs
Reports page with charts and Print functionality
All 34 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
